body_storage_policy: public package source bodies are exercised in place by the organ acceptance command; this manifest binds their provenance and digest relation so old metadata cannot promote the organ by itself
receipt_body_policy: receipts are evidence outputs only and are not counted as imported body substrate
source_open_payload_boundary: non-secret Microcosm package source only; no provider state, credentials, sessions, raw private state, or release authority

modules.source_role: The organ wrapper `microcosm_core.organs.derived_fact_provider_runtime` adds the standard organ contract over that capsule without re-implementing it: it loads bounded JSON fixture cases, calls the capsule's real evaluate_case on each, and classifies positives (must resolve to expected values with an ok receipt) versus negatives (must be rejected by recomputation with the exact expected error_class firing on the planted-defect fact, mapped in EXPECTED_NEGATIVE_CASES). It projects a body-free result_card and writes body-free result/board/validation/acceptance receipts via microcosm_core.receipts, and exposes run / bundle / CLI dispatch mirroring the bridge_campaign_dag_validation template exactly.

The engine-room capsule `microcosm_core.engine_room.derived_fact_provider_engine` is the executable authority: a source-faithful public refactor of system/lib/derived_fact_hologram.py + codex/doctrine/facts/fact_registry.json. It evaluates an authored fact registry against a public-safe root, resolving each row through one of three providers — json_pointer (RFC 6901, including list-index traversal), glob_count (file-count matching with optional excluded prefixes), and named callable facts (git-tracked file/python counts via a git subprocess in a tempdir) — and turns any provider failure into an error-as-data row (provider_status=error, error_class, repair hint) that degrades the receipt status from ok to degraded rather than crashing the ledger.
required_anchors: Registry-backed derived fact provider engine over public fixture roots.
provider failures become error rows with repair hints
